property.name: testRegisterUser
property.value: EventManagementSystemApplicationTests should register a new user with username, email, password, and role, then verify it's saved in the database

property.name: testLoginUser
property.value: EventManagementSystemApplicationTests should register a user, then login with correct credentials and receive a JWT token

property.name: testLoginWithWrongUsernameOrPassword
property.value: EventManagementSystemApplicationTests should return 401 Unauthorized when login attempt is made with incorrect username or password

property.name: testCreateEvent
property.value: EventManagementSystemApplicationTests should allow PLANNER role to create a new event with title and description, then verify it's saved in the database

property.name: testGetAllEvents
property.value: EventManagementSystemApplicationTests should allow PLANNER role to retrieve all events from the database and verify the count and details

property.name: testAddResource
property.value: EventManagementSystemApplicationTests should allow PLANNER role to add a new resource with name, type, and availability, then verify it's saved in the database

property.name: testGetAllResources
property.value: EventManagementSystemApplicationTests should allow PLANNER role to retrieve all resources from the database and verify the count and details

property.name: testAllocateResources
property.value: EventManagementSystemApplicationTests should allow PLANNER role to allocate resources to an event with quantity, then verify allocation is saved and resource availability is updated to false

property.name: testStaffShouldGetEventDetails
property.value: EventManagementSystemApplicationTests should allow STAFF role to retrieve event details by event ID and verify title and description

property.name: testStaffShouldUpdateEventSetup
property.value: EventManagementSystemApplicationTests should allow STAFF role to update event setup details including title, description, and location, then verify changes are saved

property.name: testClientShouldGetBookingDetails
property.value: EventManagementSystemApplicationTests should allow CLIENT role to retrieve booking details by event ID and verify title and description

property.name: testStaffAndClientShouldNotAccessPlannerApi
property.value: EventManagementSystemApplicationTests should return 403 Forbidden when STAFF or CLIENT roles attempt to access PLANNER-only API endpoints

property.name: testPlannerAndClientShouldNotAccessStaffApi
property.value: EventManagementSystemApplicationTests should return 403 Forbidden when PLANNER or CLIENT roles attempt to access STAFF-only API endpoints

property.name: testPlannerAndStaffShouldNotAccessClientApi
property.value: EventManagementSystemApplicationTests should return 403 Forbidden when PLANNER or STAFF roles attempt to access CLIENT-only API endpoints

property.name: AddResourceComponent should require name field
property.value: AddResourceComponent should validate that name field is required and show validation error when empty

property.name: AddResourceComponent should require type field
property.value: AddResourceComponent should validate that type field is required, show error when empty, and accept valid input

property.name: AddResourceComponent should require availability field1
property.value: AddResourceComponent should validate that availability field is required, show error when empty, and accept valid input

property.name: CreateEventComponent should validate form fields
property.value: CreateEventComponent should validate all form fields (title, description, dateTime, location, status) are required and form is valid only when all fields are filled

property.name: CreateEventComponent should validate form fields as invalid
property.value: CreateEventComponent should invalidate form when any field is empty or when valid values are reset to empty

property.name: HttpService should be created
property.value: HttpService should be created successfully

property.name: HttpService should get booking details
property.value: HttpService should send GET request to retrieve booking details by event ID with Authorization header and return response

property.name: HttpService should get event details
property.value: HttpService should send GET request to retrieve event details by event ID with Authorization header and return response

property.name: HttpService should get all events
property.value: HttpService should send GET request to retrieve all events with Authorization header and return array of events

property.name: HttpService should get all resources
property.value: HttpService should send GET request to retrieve all resources with Authorization header and return array of resources

property.name: HttpService should create event
property.value: HttpService should send POST request to create a new event with event details and Authorization header, then return success response

property.name: HttpService should update event
property.value: HttpService should send PUT request to update event setup by event ID with updated details and Authorization header, then return success response

property.name: HttpService should add resource
property.value: HttpService should send POST request to add a new resource with resource details and Authorization header, then return success response

property.name: HttpService should allocate resources
property.value: HttpService should send POST request to allocate resources with event ID, resource ID, and allocation details in query parameters with Authorization header, then return success response

property.name: HttpService should login
property.value: HttpService should send POST request to login endpoint with username and password, then return token in response

property.name: HttpService should register user
property.value: HttpService should send POST request to register endpoint with user details including username, email, and password, then return success message

property.name: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username and password are empty
property.value: LoginComponent should have invalid form when both username and password fields are empty

property.name: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username or password is empty
property.value: LoginComponent should have invalid form when either username or password field is empty

property.name: LoginComponent should have valid form if username and password are provided
property.value: LoginComponent should have valid form when both username and password fields are filled with valid values

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if any field is empty
property.value: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form when any of the fields (email, password, role, username) are empty

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if email is invalid
property.value: RegistrationComponent should validate email format and show invalid when email format is incorrect

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have valid form if all fields are filled correctly
property.value: RegistrationComponent should have valid form when all fields (email, password, role, username) are filled with valid values

property.name: ResourceAllocateComponent should validate form fields as invalid when quantity is empty
property.value: ResourceAllocateComponent should validate that quantity field is required and form is invalid when quantity is empty even if eventId and resourceId are filled

property.name: ViewEventsComponent should validate form fields as invalid when title is empty
property.value: ViewEventsComponent should validate that title field is required and form is invalid when title is empty even if other fields are filled

property.name: ViewEventsComponent should validate form fields as invalid when description is empty
property.value: ViewEventsComponent should validate that description field is required and form is invalid when description is empty even if other fields are filled
